creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to rkoberman from comment #6)
Well I pulled a down fresh copy of ports about a half hour ago
and deinstalled all the graphics and built anew. So all the
graphics are current as of now for sure. I guess the only way
forward is a fresh copy of src complete with a new kernel with
iwlwifi.
But in the end, it'll all be a craps shoot. I notice similar
problems mentioned in bug #273620. So I guess there's still
some things to iron out.

Thanks for your quick reply and help!

--Chris
